sglang.title: Add target module validation for init adapters
sglang.author: Beichen-Ma
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently, we assume that users specify --lora-target-modules is correct target module names. However, if this assumption is violated—specifically when:
•	--lora-path is provided, and
•	--lora-target-modules does not include all the actual adapter’s target_modules,
then it would raise Va

sglang.title: Update CUTLASS 4.2 & Enable K-Major Scale Factor for SM90 FP8 Blockwise Group GEMM
sglang.author: HydraQYH
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

CUTLASS 4.2 supports scale factors in the K-Major format, allowing us to unify the code path with Blackwell, thus avoiding some format conversion kernel calls(per_group_transpose).
In addition, we optimized scenes with smaller M by swapping the A/B matrices.
Use the ATen interface to det

vllm.title: [New Model]Donut model
vllm.author: princepride
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
FIX #18850.
This PR adds support for Donut-like models, resolving issue #18850.
It implements the Donut model and the structurally similar Dolphin model. Since the Donut model uses a Swin Transformer as its vision backbone, this PR also includes the implementation for the Swin model.

vllm.author: DarkLight1337

Purpose
This PR refactors the prompt update logic to support dynamic target and content inside PromptUpdate, and resolve them earlier inside _cached_apply_hf_processor. This lets us simplify the implementation of _merge_mm_kwargs considerably in #23018.
